title: gonolobus mollis
intro: Gonolobus mollis, also known as the velvety or soft dogbane, is a plant species in the Apocynaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Gonolobus mollis include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and soothing skin irritations. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, tinctures, and topical creams, which can be used to treat various health issues.
